title: ctenopterella nhatrangensis
intro: Ctenopterella nhatrangensis, also known as Cat's Whisker, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally used in Vietnamese medicine, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopterella nhatrangensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
